{{CargoRelic
|name=Tail-burned Guqin
|class_id=22660
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|birthday=10-28
|source=
|description=On Oct 28, 192 AD, Cai Yong was imprisoned due to his comments on Dong Zhuo, and the Tail-burned Guqin was also taken into the national treasury.<br>The Tail-burned Guqin, one of the renowned ancient Chinese stringed instruments, was created by Cai Yong, a prominent literary figure of the Eastern Han Dynasty. Legend has it that Cai Yong rescued a charred piece of wood from a fire and transformed it into a magnificent seven-stringed instrument. The instrument, known for its exceptional and unmatched sound, earned its name from the charred mark on the wood. The fame of the Tail-burned Guqin quickly spread far and wide.
|fame=57
|art=108
|fth=63
|civ=73
|tech=61
|ss1=Gene Research Free Speedup +13m 30s<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +90<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +6<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss2=Gene Research Free Speedup +18m<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +180<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +7<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss3=Gene Research Free Speedup +22m 30s<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +270<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +8<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss4=Gene Research Free Speedup +31m 30s<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +450<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +10<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss5=Gene Research Free Speedup +40m 30s<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +630<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +12<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss6=Gene Research Free Speedup +54m<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +15<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40
|ss7=Gene Research Free Speedup +54m<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900<br>Per Master Chef's Legacy activated, Snail ATK +15<br>Master Chef's Legacy activated: 40/40<br>Per 60 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill2=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Snail HP +6000
|skill3=[[File:Cathay skill III.png|50px]]Place in Cathay Museum: In Cathay, Snail DEF +600
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Master of the Famous Instrument|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|W-tadpole, +1000|orange}}
|3name=Duke Huan|3rec=90.42M|3atk=293275|3defense=171113|3hp=21937486|3weak=37911
|4name=King Zhuang|4rec=99.74M|4atk=314272|4defense=184220|4hp=25916135|4weak=39640
|5name=Officer Sima|5rec=111.13M|5atk=339282|5defense=200250|5hp=31856975|5weak=42210
|6name=Officer Cai|6rec=124.84M|6atk=368920|6defense=219542|6hp=40774230|6weak=45403
|Arec=142.19M|Aatk=407389|Adefense=243952|Ahp=54181288|Aweak=48884
}}}}
